content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending PR-watch remediation in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs`: GitHub reactions and PR review comments now use paginated `gh api --paginate --slurp` responses with flattening before parsing; failed CI decisions inspect `gh run view <run_id> --log-failed` output so the known-flake rerun path can match actual failed Rust test names instead of only the Actions job name; and bot line-comment filtering now prefers `created_at >= latest_push_at` when the latest push timestamp is known, using commit SHA only as a fallback. Added regression coverage for second-page bot comments, known-flake detection from run logs, non-flake failed test logs, and timestamp precedence over head SHA.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree still contains `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/run.json` orchestration-state modifications outside the source-review scope.","Plain `cargo` in the ambient shell cannot run because

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn

None provided.

None identified.
